inputs.label: Number of Spins
inputs.businessContext: Total number of roulette wheel spins to analyze.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of roulette wheel spins to analyze.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Analiz edilecek toplam rulet çarkı dönüş sayısı.

inputs.label: Numbers Covered per Spin
inputs.businessContext: Quantity of numbers wagered on in each spin (e.g., 1 for straight-up).

businessContext_i18n.en: Quantity of numbers wagered on in each spin (e.g., 1 for straight-up).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her dönüşte bahis oynanan sayı miktarı (örneğin, tek sayı için 1).

inputs.label: Payout Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Payout ratio for a winning spin (e.g., 35 for straight-up bet in European roulette).

businessContext_i18n.en: Payout ratio for a winning spin (e.g., 35 for straight-up bet in European roulette).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kazanan bir dönüş için ödeme oranı (örneğin, Avrupa ruletinde tek sayı bahsi için 35).

inputs.label: Bet Amount per Spin
inputs.businessContext: Wager placed on each individual spin.

businessContext_i18n.en: Wager placed on each individual spin.

inputs.label: Total Numbers on Wheel
inputs.businessContext: Total pockets (37 for European single-zero, 38 for American double-zero).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total pockets (37 for European single-zero, 38 for American double-zero).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam cep sayısı (Avrupa tek sıfır için 37, Amerikan çift sıfır için 38).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
